productDisplayName: Puma Men's Match Classic White & Green Shoe
description: Composition:Vulcanised leather and synthetic shoe with gum rubber soleFitting:Regular FitThis pair of white casual shoes from puma, with green accents and sturdy gum rubber soles, is an extremely comfortable and stylish everyday wear. The soles provide good grip on wooden surfaces as well as grass making it a great footwear when on an adventurous hike.
